title: Add brownfield intent admission fixtures
problem: The Protostar repository needs brownfield draft examples that prove the deterministic admission gate blocks weak intents and promotes complete bounded intents without touching factory execution internals.
context: Protostar is an existing TypeScript workspace whose factory CLI can route draft intent JSON through packages/intent and packages/policy before creating confirmed intent artifacts.

acceptanceCriteria.statement: The examples/intents/brownfield directory contains one blocked weak draft and one promoted clear draft with brownfield mode.
The clear brownfield fixture promotes through deterministic intent admission with ambiguity at or below 0.20.

constraints: Keep authority limited to examples/intents/brownfield fixture files.
Do not change execution, review repair, delivery, or Dogpile planning internals.
stopConditions: Stop if deterministic admission reports ambiguity above 0.20.
Stop if policy flags authority outside examples/intents/brownfield.

toolPermissions.reason: Verify the deterministic intent admission fixture path.
